summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Profile Tab 11-point layout overhaul. All features verified working correctly including: Quick controls toggles, read-only Display Name, Age display, Bio/Presence Note with character counters, Intent dropdown, My Type validation (10-40 chars), Who I'm open to meeting with PRIVATE badge, Home Area 2-step picker, Profile Preview modal with Before/After reveal tabs, and Save functionality.

profile_tab_loads.description: Profile Tab loads correctly at /profile-tab route

quick_controls_section.description: Quick controls section appears after Photos with both toggles (Shy + Hide from discovery). Toggles work correctly with visual feedback and toast messages.

display_name_readonly.description: Display Name field is read-only (shown as div, not input) with text 'Set during registration • cannot be changed'

age_display.description: Age field displays correctly with text 'Set during registration • Only your age is shown to others'. Shows 'Age not set' for demo user.

bio_field.description: Bio textarea works with character counter (0/500) and 'Minimum 10 characters' label

presence_note_field.description: Presence Note input works with character counter (0/40) and description 'A tiny hint of who you are — visible even while blurred'

intent_dropdown.description: Intent dropdown has options: Select your intent..., Dating, Friends, Open to both

my_type_validation.description: My type of person field has 10-40 char validation. Shows 'X more needed' for short text, checkmark for valid text, and error toast on save with invalid text.

who_open_to_meeting.description: Who I'm open to meeting dropdown shows 'PRIVATE' badge with text 'Used for matching only — never shown on your profile'. Options: Select..., Men, Women, Everyone, Prefer not to say

home_area_picker.description: Home Area has 2-step Country → Region picker. Countries: UK, US, Canada, Australia, Ireland, Germany, France, Spain, Italy, Netherlands, Other. Region picker appears after country selection.

celebrity_crush_removed.description: Celebrity Crush field is NOT present (correctly removed)

profile_preview_modal.description: Profile Preview modal works with Before/After reveal tabs. Close button works.

pre_reveal_layout.description: Pre-reveal shows: Name, Age, Presence Note, Shy indicator only. Shows 'Bio hidden', 'Type hidden', 'Location hidden' badges.

post_reveal_layout.description: Post-reveal shows: Bio (ABOUT section), My Type (MY TYPE OF PERSON IS section), Intent (HERE FOR section), Home Area (BASED IN section), Voice intro

save_functionality.description: Save button successfully saves profile data with 'Profile saved!' toast message

passed_tests: Profile Tab loads at /profile-tab
Quick controls section visible with Shy and Hide from discovery toggles
Shy toggle clickable and shows visual feedback
Visibility toggle clickable with toast 'You're now hidden from discovery'
Display Name shown as read-only with 'cannot be changed' text
Age field displays with 'Only your age is shown to others' text
Bio textarea accepts input with character counter
Presence Note input accepts input with character counter
Intent dropdown has Dating, Friends, Open to both options
My Type field shows 'X more needed' for short text
My Type field shows checkmark for valid text (10+ chars)
Save with short My Type shows error toast
Who I'm open to meeting shows PRIVATE badge
Home Area Country picker shows all countries
Home Area Region picker appears after country selection
Celebrity Crush field NOT present
Profile Preview modal opens with Preview My Profile button
Before Reveal tab shows Name, Presence Note, hidden badges
After Reveal tab shows Bio, My Type, Intent, Home Area
Save button saves profile with success toast
critical_code_review_comments: All 11-point Profile Layout requirements implemented correctly
data-testid attributes present on all key interactive elements
Character counters working correctly for Bio (500), Presence Note (40), My Type (40)
Validation messages are user-friendly and informative
PRIVATE badge clearly indicates who_open_to_meeting is not shown publicly
2-step Home Area picker resets region when country changes (correct behavior)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile Tab 11-point layout overhaul fully tested and working. Key features: (1) Quick controls with Shy + Hide toggles at top, (2) Display Name read-only, (3) Age display only (no DOB edit), (4) Bio/Presence Note with counters, (5) Intent dropdown with 3 options, (6) My Type 10-40 char validation, (7) Who I'm open to meeting with PRIVATE badge, (8) Home Area 2-step picker, (9) Celebrity Crush removed, (10) Profile Preview with Before/After tabs showing correct fields. All data-testid selectors working correctly.
